svg.title: Valve Rack — 5x2 Solenoid Valve Array
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the 10-valve rack (5x2 grid). Scale: 3.5 px/mm. Beduan 2-Way NC solenoid valves (B07NWCQJK9). All caliper-verified dimensions in mm.
svg.text: All dimensions in mm | Caliper-verified where noted
3. Valve is T-shaped: white body + centered metal coil
4. No built-in mounting features -- rack cradle required
5. Spade connectors parallel to tube flow axis (Y)
6. QC fittings on both Y ends for 1/4" OD tubing
7. Metal coil ~0.65mm narrower than white body per side
9. Rack at Y=140-195 in enclosure (behind dock)
10. 4mm inter-row gap between bottom and top rows
